name: Zaporizhzhia Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the Cossack red — the historic regimental banner of the Zaporozhian Sich
the steppe, and the dignity of the Zaporozhian Cossack tradition

description: A red field charged with the coat of arms of Zaporizhzhia Oblast — a Cossack with a musket above a wreath of wheat, all reflecting the region as the heartland of the Zaporozhian Sich.
history: Adopted as the regional flag of Zaporizhzhia Oblast, the historic territory of the Zaporozhian Cossack Sich on the lower Dnipro. The red field recalls the Sich's regimental banners.

features.role: arms of Zaporizhzhia Oblast — Cossack figure
